加密貨幣與區塊鏈 ·

塞勒：完全不賣比特幣恐礙信評，策略性出售議題浮上檯面Saylor Warns a Rigid No-Sale Stance Could Undermine Bitcoin as a Treasury Asset

https://cointelegraph.com/news/strategy-mstr-michael-saylor-bitcoin-sell-statement-btc?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

  • 塞勒在播客補充財報說法，指若市場認定公司永不出售龐大比特幣部位，信評角度可能質疑其是否像可動用資產。
  • 他提到比特幣市場存在可觀流動性，且與自家股債關聯有限；完全拒絕變現恐讓資產看起來被「弱化」。
  • 先前他亦談到必要時可少量出貨以緩解恐慌預期，與長期強調持有的論述並陳，引發社群熱議。
  • 該公司多年來持續累積部位，近日再傳小額加倉，整體持幣規模仍為市場焦點。

微策略負責人塞勒在播客延伸財報談話，認為「永不賣」若被當成鐵律，可能讓巨額比特幣看似缺乏可運用性與外部流動性想像，亦點出幣市自有深度；先前談及必要時小額出貨穩定情緒，仍與長期口號並陳而受關注。

  • On a podcast Saylor expanded the earnings message that if markets assumed Strategy would never unwind a huge Bitcoin book, rating logic could question its liquidity as a balance-sheet asset.
  • He pointed to sizable Bitcoin market depth that sits largely outside his firm's equity and credit story; refusing any sales might itself impair perceived usefulness.
  • He had also floated modest disposals to steady panic narratives, which sits uneasily beside the long-running never-sell branding.
  • The company has kept building its treasury for years and recently added another small purchase, keeping total holdings in the spotlight.

Saylor widened earnings remarks on a podcast, arguing infinite no-sale assumptions could make giant Bitcoin books look illiquid to ratings while stan…
